headlines.description: — Andrew Nembhard had 28 points and a season-high 12 assists, and helped Indiana regain control in the fourth quarter as the Pacers beat the Sacramento Kings 116-105 on Monday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Andrew Nembhard sparks the Pacers to a 116-105 victory over the Kings

headlines.description: — Mark Williams had 22 points and seven rebounds, and the Phoenix Suns overcame Anthony Edwards' 40 points to snap the Minnesota Timberwolves' five-game winning streak with a 108-105 victory Monday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Suns overcome Edwards' 40 points and snap Timberwolves' 5-game win streak with 108-105 victory

headlines.shortLinkText: Spurs spoil Queen's first triple-double and hold on to beat the Pelicans 135-132
